meta.description: Superblock field mapping for ext4: kernel (6.12.31) → e2fsprogs (1.47.4) → documentation → ConfD mke2fs_constraints

superblock_field_layout.doc: Per group desc for online growth
All inodes have at least # bytes

disk_to_mem_mappings.detail: sbi->s_cluster_ratio = 1 << s_log_cluster_size (if bigalloc); s_cluster_bits = s_log_block_size_bits + s_log_cluster_size
EXT4_SB(sb)->s_es->s_feature_compat; checked via ext4_has_feature_xxx() inline functions (generated by EXT4_FEATURE_COMPAT_FUNCS macro)
Copied from es->s_volume_name or device name

confd_to_superblock__about: Each entry provides a three-layer bridge: (1) ConD's e2fsprogs variable/function name -- (2) ext4_super_block on-disk super block field/bitmask -- (3) kernel-side ext4_sb_info memory field and ext4_has_feature_xxx() function. This mapping enables extending ConD-discovered dependencies from user-space to kernel mount option analysis. For other filesystems, the mechanism is identical.

confd_to_superblock.note: ratio for computing inode count, not directly in superblock

confd_to_superblock.formula: if s_rev_level > 0 then s_inode_size := user_value else s_inode_size := 128
s_inodes_count := derived from blocksize x inode_ratio
confd_to_superblock.note: derived from blocksize × inode_ratio; stored in s_inodes_count
used to compute s_r_blocks_count; not a dedicated superblock field
mke2fs runtime flag, not stored in superblock
mke2fs runtime flag, not stored in superblock
mke2fs runtime flag, not stored in superblock
mke2fs runtime flag, not stored in superblock
mke2fs runtime flag (-S), not stored in superblock
mke2fs -E discard: enable block discard during mkfs
mke2fs -E nodiscard: disable block discard during mkfs
mke2fs runtime flag, skip zero-fill if pre-zeroed
mke2fs -E quotatype: which quota types (usr/grp/prj) to enable

confd_to_superblock.formula: s_jnl_blocks := user_value (internal journal); external if journal device given
s_journal_inum := user_value (internal journal); external device if journal_dev feature
journal fast commit area sized by user_value; sets s_feature_compat OR 0x0400
orphan file blocks calculated from user_value; sets s_feature_compat OR 0x1000

usage_notes.general_mechanism: 每种文件系统都有对应的用户态工具套件(e2fsprogs/xfsprogs/btrfs-progs/...)，其 mkfs/fsck/resize 等工具通过共享库(libext2fs/libxfs/libbtrfs)共享同一 on-disk super block 结构体定义。ConfD 利用这一机制，通过 LLVM IR 中不同工具代码内完全相同的变量名/函数名来发现跨工具依赖。confd_to_superblock 节将 e2fsprogs 的变量名/函数名映射到磁盘 ext4_super_block 字段和内核ext4_sb_info 内存字段，形式: '用户态变量名->磁盘字段->内核对应' 的三层桥接
usage_notes.confd_bridge_layers: 1. confd_variable/e2fs_func: ConfD在 LLVM IR 中匹配的用户态变量名/函数; 2. disk_field/bitmask_hex: 磁盘 ext4_super_block 中的实际存储字段; 3. kernel_func/kernel_mem_field: ext4_has_feature_xxx() 检查函数/内核 ext4_sb_info 中对应的内存字段
usage_notes.bitmask_fields: s_feature_compat, s_feature_ro_compat, s_feature_incompat are 32-bit bitmasks. Each bit is tested via the ext4_has_feature_xxx() inline function, which checks EXT4_SB(sb)->s_es->s_feature_XXX & cpu_to_le32(EXT4_FEATURE_XXX_YYY).
usage_notes.logarithmic_fields: s_log_block_size and s_log_cluster_size store log2 of actual values. blocksize = 1024 << s_log_block_size. Stored value 0→1024, 1→2048, 2→4096...
usage_notes.not_in_superblock: Some mke2fs parameters like inode_ratio, reserved_ratio, lazy_itable_init are not stored directly in the superblock. They are either computed values or runtime-only flags.
usage_notes.e2fsprogs_vs_kernel_diff: e2fsprogs has additional features (lazy_bg, exclude_bitmap, has_snapshot, replica, shared_blocks) not defined in the kernel. Kernel has btree_dir which e2fsprogs removed.
